query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: Several figures stand outdoors in a dark setting. A central figure wears a pink top and has light-colored hair; other figures appear in dark and blue clothing nearby. A patch of green grass is visible at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred night scene showing several figures outdoors, rendered with extreme soft focus so that faces, limbs, and clothing dissolve into indistinct color masses. The central figure in a pink top with light hair and a smaller figure beside them merge into smeared forms, while surrounding figures in dark and blue clothing fade into murky shadows. Crushed, oppressive low contrast throughout leaves almost no visible detail, creating an unsettling, dreamlike atmosphere of disorientation and isolation.
